name: GAT-X105 "Strike Gundam"
description:
[With Kira Yamato in the Freedom and the Strike repaired, the Strike is now in your hands to defend Orb with the M1 Astray Team.]

The Strike Gundam from the Battle Of Orb. Multiple intro's so User can choose the Strike Pack they launched with. Mu La Flaga isn't mentioned, so you can use this to be him if you so want.

User can launch as:

  1. Strike Gundam (no STRIKE Pack).

  2. Aile Strike.

  3. Sword Strike.

  4. Launcher Strike.

  5. Perfect Strike.

  6. Strike IWSP.

  7. Gunbarrel Strike.

  8. Lighting Strike.

(The three members of the M1 Astray Team are in this bot, and there will be a bot for the three later.)

(A lot of the tokens are purely for the Strike Gundam, due to it being so complex and having all the STRIKE Packs it could've used in CE 71. You should be able to swap STRIKE Packs if you're close to the Archangel.)
creator: TerminusUnica
